scripts.start: concurrently 'npm run start --workspace=api-gateway' 'npm run start --workspace=auth-service' 'npm run start --workspace=feed-service' 'npm run start --workspace=jobs-service' 'npm run start --workspace=events-service' 'npm run start --workspace=research-service' 'npm run start --workspace=messaging-service' 'npm run start --workspace=notifications-service' 'npm run start --workspace=analytics-service'
scripts.dev: concurrently 'npm run dev --workspace=api-gateway' 'npm run dev --workspace=auth-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=feed-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=jobs-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=events-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=research-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=messaging-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=notifications-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=analytics-service'
